content:
Grateful to have received the #Virtue #Award for Q1 - 2026 at Atlas Copco Group GECIA by the hands of our SDH Santosh Shinde sir. 

This recognition was for the innovation we did to streamline the existing working process. 

We automised several reptative tasks in SOP (Standard Operating Procedure) creation which led to significant drop in manual effort helping reduce errors and improve efficiency. 

This automation will help to save around 250 hrs of work per year alongside save costs upto 5.5 to 6L INR.

This utility has reduced our turnaround time and improved productivity.

We streamlined templates for various divisions and bought various product companies on same page. 

Special thanks to Suraj Jagdale for constantly supporting on developing this utility.

Many thanks to Mandar Hiralikar for constant encouragement and guidance in each step of development of this utility.

We learnt and applied #Visual #Basic ourselves and deployed the code too.

We also used #AI Tools like #Copilot and #Gemini #LLM at places where we stuck up.

Onwards & Upwards always! 🏆

actor.name: Jan-Cees Onderwater
actor.position: Manager Sales

content:
We did it again – another successful mobilization completed! 

Hydrotechnik Offshore GmbH has successfully completed the mobilization of our Big Bubble Curtain system for another offshore project in Germany. 
In Cuxhaven, together with our trusted partners HTO Krane, Atlas Copco Rental Solutions, Thiele Metalltechnik GmbH, Tidewater and Cuxhavener Schiffahrtskontor, we completed what was probably our warmest mobilization to date. 
Thanks to detailed planning, efficient logistics, excellent teamwork and many many liters of drinking water, the complete system – including compressors, deployment equipment and the installation vessel – was mobilized safely, efficiently and on schedule. 
Bubble Curtain systems play a key role in reducing underwater noise during offshore construction activities, helping to protect marine life while supporting the expansion of sustainable offshore wind energy. 

A big thank you to our dedicated team and all project partners for their commitment, professionalism and outstanding collaboration. We are proud to contribute to another important offshore wind project in Germany. 

#Hydrotechnik #Offshore #BubbleCurtain #OffshoreWind #MarineConstruction #NoiseMitigation #EnvironmentalProtection #Teamwork #ProjectManagement

content:
That was not a normal June in Alberta when it has recorded its wettest in over 60 years, and more rain is still coming.

Edmonton has already recorded around 190 mm of rainfall this June alone making it the second-wettest June for the city on record. A new low-pressure  system is now expected to bring an additional 50 to 80 mm of rainfall to central Alberta between Friday and Monday, with localized flooding, washouts, and infrastructure disruptions all on the table. The ground is already saturated. There is nowhere left for the water to go. 

For operations running in central Alberta right now, dewatering is not a future consideration. It is a present one.

The Atlas Copco WEDA submersible pump lineup including the portable D10 and D30, is built for exactly this kind of situation. Electric, compact, and deployable fast, these units go where the water is and start moving it immediately. Collicutt carries the full WEDA lineup and our team can help match the right unit to your site conditions before the next system rolls through.

For site managers and operations leads, with more rain forecasted this weekend, does your operation have a pumping solution in place, or are you hoping the drainage holds?

content:
🔑 Keycard Sponsor Announcement #GWCO2NA

We're proud to announce Atlas Copco as the Keycard Sponsor of the North American CO₂ Summit 2026, New Orleans, 14–16 September.

At Atlas Copco, the commitment is clear: supporting the decarbonisation of industries by providing CO₂ compression and treatment solutions that help customers capture and compress CO₂, and reduce their emissions.

As the CO₂ market faces growing supply pressures and an accelerating sustainability agenda, Atlas Copco's presence at the Summit reflects exactly where the industry conversation needs to go. Their team will be on the exhibition floor in New Orleans, come and find them.

📅 14–16 September 2026 | Sheraton New Orleans Hotel

actor.name: Ollie Ford
actor.position: Business Development Engineer - Industrial Gases

content:
In laser cutting, manufacturers have traditionally faced a trade-off:

➡️ Oxygen for quality
➡️ Nitrogen for speed

But what if you didn’t have to choose?

The Atlas Copco LC MIX changes the game by blending nitrogen and oxygen to deliver the best of both worlds, faster cutting speeds and cleaner, high-quality edges.

Designed specifically for laser cutting applications, the LC MIX helps manufacturers boost productivity while maintaining exceptional finish quality, without adding complexity to operations.

As the industry pushes for greater efficiency, lower costs, and better results, solutions like this are redefining what’s possible on the shop floor.

#LaserCutting #Manufacturing #Innovation #IndustrialGases #Productivity #AtlasCopcoUK #Engineering #SmartManufacturing

Prior experience as a Workshop Technician, Service Technician, Mechanical Technician, or similar role Strong fault finding skills and genuine pride in your work A genuine heart for service you care about doing the right thing for customers and your teammates A strong safety mindset and respect for processes and standards Willingness to keep learning and building your technical skills Restricted Electrical License

content:
Eventos climáticos extremos mostram a dimensão dos riscos para cidades, operações e comunidades: redes sobrecarregadas, áreas alagadas, interrupções operacionais e necessidade urgente de resposta rápida. Essa realidade reforça um ponto essencial: a preparação precisa vir antes da próxima ocorrência.

Para operações de Defesa Civil, a solução mais completa é combinar bombas muito portáteis para a primeira resposta com bombas de maior vazão para ações prolongadas.

A Atlas Copco Power Technique possui motobombas diesel leves, portáteis, autoescorvantes e movidas a gasolina, ideais para deslocamento rápido e uso emergencial.

Para ruas, porões, túneis e áreas alagadas onde a bomba pode trabalhar dentro da água, os modelos WEDA oferecem praticidade e robustez para drenagem submersível, com capacidade de resposta em cenários severos de inundação, inclusive com presença de sólidos.

E quando a operação exige vazão elevada, maior alcance e funcionamento contínuo, a família PAS possui as maiores capacidades de vazão e altura manométrica para máxima criticidade da aplicação.

Defesa Civil preparada não espera a crise começar. Solicite uma cotação agora mesmo pelo WhatsApp e esteja pronto!
https://lnkd.in/dnKme4P9

#AtlasCopco #PowerTechnique #Saneamento #Drenagem #Mineração #Indústrias #BombasDeDrenagem #Infraestrutura #DefesaCivil #PAS150HF #PAS200HF #WEDA #Motobombas
